title: Stop wasting your Saturdays on tire kickers
dek: Your calendar is your inventory. Qualifying is how you stop giving it away for free.
heroAlt: Stop wasting your Saturdays on tire kickers

blocks.html: Every agent has lived this Saturday. Four showings, three neighborhoods, one client who cannot state their budget, and by 5 p.m. you realize the day produced nothing but mileage. The problem was not the market. The problem was scheduled before the first tour.

Qualifying is not gatekeeping and it is not rude. It is the professional act of confirming a decision can actually happen before you invest a day in it. Timeline, budget, decision makers, requirements. Four answers, five minutes, and your calendar transforms.

blocks.text: Amateurs chase everyone. Professionals choose. That choice is the whole difference in income per hour.

items.title: When do you need to move?
items.html: Anything past ninety days is a nurture contact, not a Saturday showing. Stay in touch, do not tour yet.

items.title: What is the comfortable monthly number?
items.html: Not the max. The comfortable number. Vague answers here predict vague decisions later.

items.title: Who else is part of the decision?
items.html: Every absent decision maker is a guaranteed second tour. Get everyone to the first one.

items.title: What are the true non-negotiables?
items.html: In-unit laundry, parking, a dog over fifty pounds. Deal breakers surfaced early save entire wasted weekends.

blocks.html: Write your four qualifying questions as one friendly message you can send every new inquiry. Serious clients answer within the hour. That speed is itself the signal.
Lead Gen Mastery, Course 3, pairs the filter with follow-up tracks for the not-yet-ready, so nobody gets discarded, just scheduled correctly.

blocks.lead: Course 3 covers qualifying frameworks in full.
blocks.label: Explore the Courses
